CustomField.formula:
IF(Repstor__c == true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'Repstor;' , '') &
IF(FS_Ops_Only__c == true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'FS Ops Only;' , '') &
IF(PS_Ops_Only__c == true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'PS Ops Only;' , '') &
IF(G_Cloud__c == true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'G-Cloud;' , '') &
IF(FS_Sales__c == true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'FS Sales;' , '') &
IF(PS_Sales__c== true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'PS Sales;' , '') &
IF(Legal_Sales__c== true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'Legal Sales;' , '') &
IF(A_C_Sales__c== true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'AC Sales;' , '') &
IF(Corporate_Sales__c== true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'Corporate Sales;' , '') &
IF(Ops_Only__c== true,Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'Ops Only;', '') &
IF(Partner_Sales__c == true, Price_book_Code__c & ' ' & 'Partner Sales; ' , '')
CustomField.label: OP4I Pricebook
